name: lock file merge logic uses union for the standards_versions section per the section 2.7 contract
command: printf '{"standards_versions":{"a":"v1"}}\n' > a.json && printf '{"standards_versions":{"b":"v2"}}\n' > b.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/merge-lock.sh" --a a.json --b b.json --out merged.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"a":"v1"' merged.json && grep -q '"b":"v2"' merged.json && echo ok 1>&2
